title: French Smoky Vegetarian Soufflé
description: A rich and savory soufflé with a smoky twist, perfect for a French-inspired vegetarian dinner.
instructions: Butter a 9x13 inch baking dish and set aside.
In a large skillet, sauté the cubed bread with butter until lightly toasted.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, garlic, and thyme.
Add the shredded cheese to the egg mixture and stir until well combined.
Add the toasted bread to the egg mixture and stir until a uniform mixture forms.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the soufflé is puffed and golden brown.
